sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107637" key="u(perke/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερκέρ-ως</orth> (proparox.), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <sense id="n107637.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with immense horns,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαφος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.76</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
